ground_truth:
Patient Record: Follow-up consultation. Diagnosis: Chronic gingivitis (K05.151) with pigmentation. Treatment: Full-mouth supragingival ultrasonic scaling and air polishing.
Examination: Generalized gingival swelling with easy bleeding on probing, no periodontal pockets detected. Presence of calculus and pigmentation.
Radiographic Examination: No radiographs taken.
Diagnosis: Chronic gingivitis (K05.151) with pigmentation.
Treatment Plan: Full-mouth supragingival ultrasonic scaling and air polishing.
Treatment Recommendations: 
Management: The patient was informed about the condition, treatment plan, costs, and prognosis and consented to treatment. Plaque disclosing, full-mouth ultrasonic scaling, air polishing, fluoride varnish application, and iodine glycerin were performed. Oral hygiene instruction (OHI) was provided, including brushing, flossing, and interdental brush use.
Medical Instructions: Avoid acidic foods and extreme temperatures for one week. Maintain oral hygiene with mouthwash. Regular check-ups and follow-up if discomfort occurs.
Remarks:

ground_truth:
Patient Record: Follow-up consultation. Diagnosis: Angle’s Class III malocclusion (K07.200x013).
Examination: The retraction is effective.
Radiographic Examination: 
Diagnosis: Angle Class III malocclusion (K07.200x013).
Treatment Plan: 
Treatment Recommendations: 
Management: Teeth 11, 12, 21, 22, 31, 32, 41, and 42 were banded together from canine to canine on both arches. The mandibular arch had power chains replaced to enhance retraction.
Medical Instructions: 1. Avoid biting hard or sticky foods. 2. Schedule follow-ups every 3-4 weeks. 3. Return for a check-up if there is any discomfort, tooth mobility, or appliance detachment.
Remarks:
